character.name: Shen Zhiyi
character.appearance: Cold elegance with sharp features, black hair tied in a high ponytail, tailored black suit with silver thread, piercing eyes with faint vulnerability

scenes.narration: The city's lights reflect in her coffee cup like scattered stars
scenes.visual_prompt: Close-up of Shen Zhiyi's silhouette against warm desk lamp, black suit with silver thread, coffee steam rising, long finger tracing cup rim #cold_elegance #lawyer_chic

scenes.narration: A single light illuminates the empty corridor like a silent heartbeat
scenes.visual_prompt: Wide shot of empty corridor with single light bulb, shadow of Shen Zhiyi walking towards office door #urban_mystery #lawyer_lantern

scenes.narration: The door creaks open like a secret waiting to be revealed
scenes.visual_prompt: Over-shoulder shot of Shen Zhiyi's back, door handle creaking, light from office spilling out #lawyer_door #midnight_mystery

scenes.narration: A perfect world where rules are written in ink
scenes.visual_prompt: Medium shot of Shen Zhiyi's hands gripping pen, legal documents spread out, shadowy desk with glowing computer screen #lawyer_workspace #ink_rules

scenes.narration: A sudden knock disrupts the perfect silence
scenes.visual_prompt: Close-up of Shen Zhiyi's eyes widening slightly, finger on door handle #lawyer_surprise #midnight_knock

scenes.narration: A diary hidden beneath the surface of perfection
scenes.visual_prompt: Low-angle shot of open diary on desk, light reflecting off pages, shadow of Shen Zhiyi's hand covering it #secret_diary #lawyer_memoir

scenes.narration: A new chapter written in unexpected ink
scenes.visual_prompt: Two-shot of Shen Zhiyi and Li Xiaofeng, her eyes reflecting his smile #lawyer_encounter #unexpected_chapter
